headline: Border Drones Cover Only 35% of Malaysia 2,669km Frontier
context: PDRM and military border drones surveil only 35% of Malaysia 2,669km land border with Thailand and Indonesia.

cards.big: Drone surveillance covers only 35% of 2,669km land borders
cards.sub: Gaps enable trafficking drug smuggling and illegal crossings

cards.big: 48 drones operate along Thai border covering only 480km continuously
cards.sub: Remaining 193km of Thai-Malaysia border monitored by daily patrols

cards.big: Kalimantan border has 12 drone stations for 1,032km frontier
cards.sub: Dense jungle canopy limits drone effectiveness to clearings and rivers

cards.big: RM450 million allocated for 80 additional border drones under RMK-13
cards.sub: Full deployment will not be achieved before 2028 due to procurement delays

cards.big: Border coverage tests whether surveillance technology can secure challenging terrain
35% drone coverage of 2,669km frontier. Border technology without ground presence creates surveillance gaps.
